w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: Media Buyer with a Creative Content Mindset
Use the following copy and asset notes to build the portfolio. Keep the final design clean and minimal.
MEDIA BUYER WITH A CREATIVE CONTENT MINDSET
Paid Media • Content Strategy • Viral Growth
I am a Media Buyer with a creative content mindset.
I combine paid media strategy with a strong understanding of content, hooks, and creative direction to build campaigns that reach the right audience and deliver measurable results.
Campaign Setup • Audience Targeting • Budget Optimization • Performance Analysis
Content Ideas • Hooks • Scripts • Creative Direction
Lead Generation • Creative Testing • Organic Reach • Viral Content
Selected paid campaign results across different industries.
Generating qualified leads requires accurate targeting, strong offers, and campaigns designed to turn interest into real opportunities.
Use the campaign screenshots available inside the folder: Other Real Estate Campaigns.
Use a small group of developer logos related to the campaigns.
Examples: Mountain View, MNHD, Palm Hills, and any other relevant developers available inside the folder.
Reaching the right audience and turning real estate interest into measurable campaign results.
Use the campaign screenshots available inside the folder: Mohamed Khalid Real Estate.
Use the Red Expo image available inside the folder instead of a logo.
Building stronger visibility for real estate projects while reaching relevant potential buyers.
Use the campaign screenshots available inside the Arabuild folder.
Reaching customers who are actively planning their next home upgrade.
Use the campaign screenshots available inside the Tree Design folder.
Connecting finishing services with homeowners looking for trusted and practical solutions.
Use the campaign screenshots available inside the Creative Decor folder.
Turning product interest into direct conversations with customers who have real purchase intent.
Use the file named: Logo, if available.
Use the campaign screenshots available inside the Saad Mohamed Saad folder.
Reaching customers interested in furniture and turning design interest into sales opportunities.
Use the campaign screenshots available inside the Lucchi folder.
Reaching the right audience and building measurable engagement around fashion products.
Use the campaign screenshots available inside the BIA folder.
Creating immediate attention and encouraging customers to take action.
Use the campaign screenshots available inside the FishTime folder.
Increasing local visibility and reaching customers interested in trying the product.
Use the campaign screenshots available inside the Grand Yoza folder.
Reaching customers looking for food solutions for events and special occasions.
Use the campaign screenshots available inside the Meats & Greats folder.
Increasing visibility and reaching an audience interested in economic and media-related content.
Use the name Aya Kamal as the main visual identity.
Use the campaign screenshots available inside the Aya Kamal folder.
Strong performance does not start when the ad goes live.
It starts with content that captures attention.
I do not only manage campaigns. I also create content ideas, hooks, and creative angles that generate organic reach and viral growth.
Building organic reach through strong ideas, clear hooks, and engaging storytelling.
Use the high-view content screenshots available inside the Saeed Gamal folder.
Add the correct platform logo beside each screenshot: Instagram, TikTok, or Facebook.
Presenting real estate topics in a simple and engaging way that reaches a wider audience.
Use the Red Expo image available inside the folder.
Use the high-view content screenshots available inside the Mohamed Khalid Real Estate folder.
Add the correct platform logo beside each screenshot: Instagram, TikTok, or Facebook.
Turning economic and media expertise into clear and engaging content for a wider audience.
Use the name Aya Kamal as the main visual identity.
Use the high-view content screenshots available inside the Aya Kamal folder.
Add the correct platform logo beside each screenshot: Instagram, TikTok, or Facebook.
Presenting design ideas in a simple visual format that attracts attention and increases engagement.
Use the high-view content screenshots available inside the Tree Design folder.
Add the correct platform logo beside each screenshot: Instagram, TikTok, or Facebook.
Transforming finishing projects and interior details into engaging visual content.
Use the high-view content screenshots available inside the Creative Decor folder.
Add the correct platform logo beside each screenshot: Instagram, TikTok, or Facebook.
Creating content that highlights the product and encourages customers to engage with the brand.
Use the high-view content screenshots available inside the Grand Yoza folder.
Add the correct platform logo beside each screenshot: Instagram, TikTok, or Facebook.
Let’s build campaigns and content that make a real impact.
Media Buyer with a Creative Content Mindset
